nodes.context: American criminal street gang based in Los Angeles, California, composed mainly of Mexican Americans, involved in drug-smuggling, murder, assault, and robbery.
Prison gang that controls the Florence area and Florencia 13.
Criminal street gang that had a conflict with Florencia 13.
Criminal street gang involved in a shooting incident with Florencia 13 in 2019.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang is named after the Florence area of Los Angeles County , controlled by the Mexican Mafia .
edges.context: Mexican Mafia controls the territory of Florencia 13.

edges.evidence_quote: At certain times, Florencia 13 leaders ordered killings of the East Coast Crip gang, according to former Los Angeles County Sheriff Lee Baca .
edges.context: Florencia 13 ordered killings of East Coast Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: On January 13, 2019, two people were shot and wounded outside the Fashion Place Mall in Salt Lake City, Utah , after an argument erupted between Florencia 13 and Norteños members.
edges.context: Florencia 13 and Norteños members were involved in a shooting argument.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños , Pueblo Bishop Bloods , Mad Swan Bloods , Harvard Park Brims , East Coast Crips (Former rivals)
edges.context: Sureños are listed as allies of Florencia 13 in the infobox.
